about: Propose new behaviour or an API addition

**What's the use case**
<!-- describe the problem first, not the solution -->

**Proposed approach** (optional)
<!-- if you already have a sketch, function signature, a fixture, a

**Why this belongs in truthcheck (not halluguard / claimcheck / adaptmem)**
<!-- truthcheck is open-web fact verification. halluguard is
     corpus-grounded text verification; claimcheck is orchestration;
     adaptmem is encoder + retrieval. Where does this land? -->

**Alternatives considered**
<!-- existing workarounds, third-party libraries, the upstream search
     APIs themselves, etc. -->
